sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82259" key="peristhlo/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιστηλόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n82259.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be set up as</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στῆλαι</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">round about</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἱ περιεστηλωμένοι ὅροι</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Jahrb.Ergänzungsheft</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:10:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.64</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Nysa, <date TEIform="date">i B. C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
